name: Shires Equestrian Products Aubrion Highgate Short Sleeve Horse Riding Base Layer
description: **Remember to measure for the perfect fit.** The Shires Equestrian Products Aubrion Highgate Short Sleeve Horse Riding Base Layer is a perfect choice for schooling rides. The quarter-zip design makes for an easy on and off and the fabric offers UPF 50+ protection, perfect for those sunny day schooling rides. The fitted shape is flattering, and flatlock seams help to prevent bulk. The shirt even features a concealed zip pocket for your phone.
